overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the bustling streets of Night City on a sunny day. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets, and approaches a massive megabuilding entrance while passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with dedicated bike lane

events.description: passing by a storefront with neon 'OPEN' sign and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red bike lane following two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shorts walking directly ahead of ego

entered.detail: dedicated red-painted bicycle lane running along the sidewalk edge
stacked cardboard boxes and blue trash bags piled on the sidewalk
large colorful digital billboards and advertisements mounted on building facades
futuristic vehicles parked along the street curb
high-rise buildings forming an urban canyon overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow downtown sidewalk with a distinctive red bike lane, surrounded by tall buildings forming an urban canyon. Cardboard boxes and trash bags line the right side while parked cars sit along the left. Neon billboards are visible overhead, and the character follows pedestrians walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with construction barriers approaching intersection

events.description: passing from dense urban canyon to area with construction barriers and delivery truck
approaching intersection with moving traffic and traffic lights

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past construction areas and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: orange and white striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge
large pink delivery truck parked on the side street
concrete wall covered in black graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The environment opens slightly as the character walks past construction barriers and a parked delivery truck on the right. The sidewalk continues alongside a graffiti-covered wall while futuristic cars drive past on the left. The character approaches an intersection with traffic lights visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing leading to open plaza with palm trees

events.description: crossing from sidewalk onto street crosswalk entering plaza area
entering open plaza with palm trees and clear view of megabuilding

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering the plaza area with palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright purple jacket crossing the plaza ahead

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with red and white painted stripes
tall palm trees lining the edges of the open plaza
massive futuristic building with distinctive sloped architecture and glass facade

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street via a marked crosswalk and enters a wide open plaza. Palm trees line the walkway and a massive megabuilding with distinctive sloped architecture dominates the view ahead. The environment shifts from enclosed urban canyon to open public space with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza leading to megabuilding entrance

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal the full height of the megabuilding facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the megabuilding entrance with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together toward the megabuilding entrance

entered.detail: large entrance to the megabuilding with stairs and overhead signage
yellow benches and concrete planters arranged in the plaza
scattered cardboard boxes and debris near the benches

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open plaza toward the imposing entrance of the megabuilding, which now fills the center of the frame. Yellow benches and scattered debris line the left side while palm trees frame the approach. The camera tilts up to show the massive scale of the building's sloped facade and neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban canyon that gradually opens into a vast public plaza dominated by a massive megabuilding. It begins on a narrow downtown sidewalk with a red bike lane, moving past cardboard boxes and neon billboards while following a stream of pedestrians. As the character progresses, the environment opens slightly to reveal construction barriers and graffiti-covered walls before the camera reaches a busy intersection with futuristic cars driving past. The scene then shifts from the enclosed street to a wide open plaza as the character crosses a marked crosswalk, where the view expands to reveal palm trees and the full sky. Finally, the camera advances through the plaza past yellow benches and debris, tilting upward to capture the imposing scale of the megabuilding's sloped facade and neon signage.
